title: In A Heavy Hour
content:
(See Note 13)

    Be glad when danger presses
    Each power your soul possesses!
     In greater strain
     Your strength shall gain,
    Till greater vict'ry blesses!
    Supports may break in pieces,
    Your friends may have caprices,
     But you shall see,
     The end will be,
    Your need of crutches ceases.
        - 'T is clear,
     Whom God makes lonely,
    To him He comes more near.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Bj�rnstjerne Martinius Bj�rnson, titled "In A Heavy Hour", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
